channel.title: Comments for page "Murphy Law in... Murphy Law's Hub!"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Murphy Law in... Murphy Law's Hub!"

item.title: Canon No is There?
item.content:encoded:
Counting the letters of "There is No Canon" gets you 5 + 2 + 2 + 5, or in other words, 7 + 7

However, it's not just that; notice how the 5 + 2 gets reversed for another 5 + 2, except backwards? That's because the way the narrative is organized, AKA, the Fabula (Google it) is reversed. In other words, it's Ana-fabulic.

But it doesn't end there! Why 5 + 2 ? Well, five had to be included! After all, Seven's ties to Five are numerous (pun not intended). This form shows specifically of the five in every seven, and how five has been subsumed into it.

The two is also important, as it refers to the Church of the Second Hytoth, whose Pantheon contains seven Gods, with the Holy 7th; Myran-leusan, "lost." This also ties back into Five, as the Holy "5th", Nesren-leusan, a Master of Psionics, was "Forgotten". This ties Fifthism also to SCP-3125.

Now it doesn't stop there either, because Hippo was a super-genius as non of us could ever hope to compare to, as SCP-3125 is the main antagonist to the Antimemetics Division. How is this relevant? Well, in the 2nd most recent tale "Wild Light", there's a throwaway line about SCP-3125 perhaps being an omniversal level threat, capable of affecting even those in higher narratives, thus making SCP-3125 a pataphysical gestalt entity (like SCP-2747). The idea of a fictional thing forces us to focus on it's own ideas sounds ridiculous, until you realize that the Antimemetics Division is easily the highest rated series on the site.

Here's the thing though with what I just said. It's a series, not a canon. And is this series called? That's right, There is No Canon! This isn't just a reference to the site itself, but also a deeply coded message through a series of stories and angles that culminates in a statement of action from the Anafabula to SCP-3125, which leads right back into itself, thus completing the Anafabula.

Now then, I don't blame you for not hinting at this, I mean, me explaining this is probably not all that great towards my own safety but it's not like my explanation contains seven crosslinks, or has seven paragraphs, or is self referential right at the

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
there are seven seas

seven continents

and seven wonders in the world.

seven days

seven sins

and seven notes in a scale —

but only six bullets in my gun.

SEE YOU MAGIC NOIR-BOY…

ok.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I've made some structural alterations and tweaked a few things here and there. There's now only two stories left for the series, There Is No Canon.

Thanks to Petrograd for letting me use their work, Recovered Media, as part of the series!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Calvin and Hobbes was an integral part of my childhood; I'd be lying through my teeth if I claimed Murphy Law was anything but my own Tracer Bullet fanfic.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I will never get tired of things that rip on noir as a genre. Reminds me of a few Calvin and Hobbes strips where Calvin's being Tracer Bullet: Private Eye. I wanna see more of this!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I guess that means that someone needs to continue the work, or we can leave it as a symbol to the waiting we endure for true cinema.

Though it may be a heavy burden to live up to the magnificent example this previous author has set, I am prepared to take on the mantle of his "greatness".

Wish me luck, friends, for I now go where angels fear to tread — following in the footsteps of this mysterious "Hippo of Greatness".

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The author is The Great Hippo- they took a brief break from the site a while ago but came back. They'll probably get around to working on this series again at some point.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Darn, the author doesn't have an account anymore…
I guess that means that someone needs to continue the work, or we can leave it as a symbol to the waiting we endure for true cinema. If that makes sense.

item.title: Wait a minute...
item.content:encoded:
The last thing the original author of There is No Canon! wrote involves SCP-2747. 2747 (Spoilers) affects narratives within narratives, making it impossible for the author to complete them. Murphy Law is a narrative within the greater narrative of SCP. The implication at the end of 2747 was that the next thing to be erased would be that document, and that rendition of the Foundationverse. Then the narrative of 'There is No Canon!' acknowledged it, meaning that it would be erased next. And suddenly the narrative can't be completed due to absence of author.

Guys, skips are real, and this is the proof. That, or Hippo is the master of Batman-gambits.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
All of these are fun to read, albeit a little silly at times.

Though I mean… They're all trumped by the Cowboy Bebop reference let's be honest.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Those damn SJWs, killing all my cancers

item.title: Re: Author's Post
item.content:encoded: At SunnyClockwork's suggestion, changed the author picture to something a bit more eternal. Updated the credit section to properly cite the source for the image.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: - Plato

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Truer words were never spoken.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You know that's not even a fake one

At some point, he must have used an 'h' somewhere

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"h" - Kurt Vonnegut

I love this.

item.title: Author's Post
item.content:encoded:
Credit
– hide block

PICTURES:

  • https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Mark_Twain,_Brady-Handy_photo_portrait,_Feb_7,_1871,_cropped.jpg
  • https://pixabay.com/en/typewriter-antique-old-1782011/
  • https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:JohnStamosHWoFFeb2012.jpg
  • https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Nilpferd_auftauchend_0505012.jpg
  • https://pixabay.com/en/agent-dangerous-detective-gangster-1294795/

To Clarify: Despite what the hub says, anyone's welcome to edit and add their own Murphy Law tales/skips, or "Murphy Law Adjacent" materials. All I ask is you not screw around with the 'Chinatown' heading without talking with me first — since I have specific plans for where that one's going.

Plans are canceled. If you want to pick up the Murphy Law 'There Is No Canon' thread, feel free to do so. I'm no longer able to continue it.

Like my nonsense? Want to read more? Check out my author's page.
